raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed rail line from Gilroy to Palmdale is estimated to cost $87 billion.",
    "The bullet train project has experienced decades of delays and rising costs.",
    "There are concerns about voter deception related to the project's compliance with Proposition 1A.",
    "Proposition 1A includes strict maximum nonstop travel times for specific corridors.",
    "The maximum nonstop travel time for the San Francisco-Los Angeles corridor is set at 2 hours, 40 minutes.",
    "The California High Speed Rail Authority is required to return to voters for approval if it moves forward with updated project proposals that do not meet original requirements."
  ]
}
